chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.197 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 23.04.2025 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Bhatti, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the bail application at some length, does not press the same and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of 3 months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant preferably within 3 months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
